Defines haptic feedback patterns with specific durations, strengths, and repeat delays.

# Purpose
This JSON configuration file defines a haptic feedback pattern. The `comments` field provides a description of the feedback type. The `notes` array contains an object that specifies a haptic feedback note with an `id` of `medium_pulse`, a `vibe_duration_ms` of 30 milliseconds, a `brake_duration_ms` of 18 milliseconds, and a `strength` of 100. The `pattern` field lists the sequence of haptic notes to play, in this case, `medium_pulse`. The `repeat_delay_ms` field sets a delay of 1000 milliseconds between repetitions of the pattern.
